title: Patch dev-tooling supply-chain findings
goal: Bump the transitive dev dependencies (esbuild to 0.28.1, vite to 8.0.16, vitest to 4.1.9, tsx) via lockfile update or package.json overrides so the four Semgrep supply-chain findings clear, while keeping npm test green and npm audit clean.

steps.title: Bump pinned versions in package-lock.json
steps.detail: Run npm update vite esbuild vitest tsx (or npm audit fix); confirm npm ls shows vite >=8.0.16, esbuild >=0.28.1, vitest >=4.1.9, tsx >=4.22.4. No overrides block added to package.json (ranges already allow it).

steps.title: npm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities
steps.detail: After the bump, npm audit exits clean — no esbuild/vite/launch-editor advisories left.

steps.title: Confirm all four Semgrep deps are off vulnerable versions
steps.detail: esbuild no longer 0.28.0 (covers GHSA-g7r4-m6w7-qqqr and GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr), vite no longer 8.0.14 (CVE-2026-53571), launch-editor not present or patched (CVE-2026-53632) — checked via npm ls.

steps.title: npm test and npm run build stay green
steps.detail: Full vitest suite passes on the bumped runner and esbuild builds dist/ without errors — confirms the dev-tooling bump did not break test/build.
